title: Update hero section text to yellow color

requirements.text: Change the hero section heading 'Pureblend Spice Private Limited' and company description text in the Hero component to yellow color for improved visibility and consistency with the existing yellow heading and tagline
acceptanceCriteria: The company name 'Pureblend Spice Private Limited' text is displayed in yellow
The three paragraph descriptions about the company, product benefits, and mission are displayed in yellow or a complementary bright color that maintains readability
Text shadows or other visual treatments ensure the yellow text remains readable against the background image
The color change is consistent with the existing yellow styling of the 'Pureblend Spice' heading and tagline

constraints: Maintain existing text shadows and visibility enhancements
Preserve the current layout and structure of the Hero component
Ensure readability against the background image
nonGoals: Modifying other sections beyond the Hero component
Altering the content or wording of the text
